testCases.name: test_case_0
testCases.input:
姓名: 未知
年龄: 36
教育背景: bachelor: Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering (Mykolaiv Building College, 2011-2019); bootcamp: Ethereum Blockchain Developer Bootcamp (Mykolaiv Building College, 2022)
工作经验: Senior .NET Engineer (04/2022 - 07/2022): Designed and developed an educational application for teachers and students using .NET Core, Angular 13, and MongoDB.; .NET Team Lead/Tech Lead (08/2021 - 07/2022): Led backend development for a mobile project related to European political parties. Set up working environment and SDLC, provided management consultations, negotiated scope with customers.; .NET Team Lead (04/2020 - 08/2021): Led development of two simultaneous projects, decided technical stack and priorities, allocated resources, communicated with stakeholders.; Bootcamp Manager/.NET Teacher (10/2019 - 03/2020): Lectured programming classes, managed teaching staff, created workflow for student projects, supervised 15 developers to MVP completion.
项目经历: Educational Application (Senior .NET Engineer): .NET Core, Angular 13, MongoDB; Backend Mobile Project (Tech Lead): European political parties platform; Two Simultaneous Projects (Team Lead): Technical stack decisions, resource allocation; Student Projects (Bootcamp Manager): Project creation, environment setup, supervision
专业技能: Languages: C#, TypeScript, JavaScript, Solidity, HTML, CSS; Frameworks: .NET Core, Angular 4+, NgRx, NGXS, ASP.NET MVC, Node.js, Express; Databases: MS SQL, MongoDB, Redis, Dapper, EF Core; Cloud: Microsoft Azure, AWS, DigitalOcean, Heroku; Tools: Git, Auth0, PowerBI, SSRS; Other: Database design, T-SQL, LINQ
求职目标: 未知
相关证书: ASP.NET MVC Advanced (CyberBionicSystematics, 2013); C# for Professionals (CyberBionicSystematics, 2013); Ethereum Blockchain Developer Bootcamp (Mykolaiv Building College, 2022); First Aid Certificate (Amateur Runner, 2014)
综合素质总结: Has excellent communication skills, mentorship experience, and education background. Amateur runner with first aid certification. Fluent in Hebrew, English (professional), and Ukrainian/Russian (native).
testCases.actualOutput:
Rank 1:
JD Content: 职位名称: Software Developer - .Net
公司名称: National General Holdings Corp.
工作地点: Winston-Salem or Cleveland
职位职责: Design, develop and test software applications; Maintain systems by identifying and correcting software defects; Create technical specifications and unit test plans; Work with QA to align understanding of requirements and to develop system test plans; Work as part of an Agile development team to solve problems and develop projects in a fast paced environment; Follow instructions and pre-established guidelines to perform the functions of the job; Demonstrate a basic degree of creativity and problem solving skills; Follow the established software development life cycle; Follow established coding standards and naming conventions; Support applications using software development methodologies including structured programming, documentation, design and code review; Work with business analysts and application users to define and design robust user centric application solutions; Collaborate with UX resources to drive consistent look and feel of user interface; Collaborate with database resources to ensure robust and complete data access and manipulation; Collaborate with IT Operations to ensure hardware and software are aligned to deliver business requirements; Mentor junior and other new developers; On-site regular attendance and punctuality are essential functions of the job
职位要求: Bachelor's Degree or in-lieu of degree equivalent education, training and work-related experience; High school diploma or general education degree (GED) required; 5+ years of experience in Microsoft technology stack; Expert in C#, JavaScript, MSSQL 2012 or above; Proficient with MVC, Angular, Asp.Net, JQuery; Hands on experience with Visual Studio & TFS as source control tool; Must have good understanding of SOLID object oriented programming (OOP) concepts; Must have experience with WCF; Experience in end-to-end Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC) project; Experience working with Agile/Scrum methodologies; Good at understanding requirements, getting clarifications; Passion for learning new technologies and enhancing existing skills; Proactive issue resolution with a positive attitude; Understand solution at the project level; Effective organization and time management skills with the ability to work under pressure and adhere to project deadlines; Excellent interpersonal skills with the ability to establish working relationships with individuals at varying levels within the organization; Demonstrated integrity within a professional environment; Ability to adapt to new situations and learn quickly; Must perform well in high-energy, dynamic and team-oriented environments; Must possess effective verbal and written communication skills
职位福利: Paid Training; Medical, Dental, Vision benefits; Wellness Programs; Life and Short/Long Term Disability Insurance; 401k w/ Company Match; Company Paid Holidays & Generous Time-off policy; Employee Discount Program; Career Advancement and Development Opportunities; On-site Healthcare Clinic (Winston-Salem and Cleveland offices); On-site Fitness Center (Cleveland and Dallas offices); Subsidized parking (Cleveland office)
职位描述总结: The role involves developing and maintaining .NET applications within an Agile team, focusing on design, testing, and collaboration with various stakeholders. The candidate must have extensive experience with Microsoft technologies, strong problem-solving skills, and the ability to work in a fast-paced environment. The position offers competitive benefits and is based in Winston-Salem or Cleveland.


-------------------------
Rank 2:
JD Content: 职位名称: Junior Level Software Developer (1-4 years experience)
公司名称: 未知
工作地点: Wall Street
职位职责: Develop software for financial structured products that runs on Bloomberg terminals; Create tools for structured products for the Buy side and the sell side (CLOs and structured products); Develop middle office software for reporting and P&L; Provide APIs for developers in the buy side or sell side firms; Work in multiple projects at the same time; Develop software for a Financial Technology Software company that provides data and analytics and portfolio products for Credit and Structuring Traders
职位要求: Must have Computer Science Undergrad / BS; Must have had an intensive background in programming either in school or at work employment; Must understand how to avoid Python memory leakage; Must understand garbage collection; Must understand how Python variables are saved in memory; Understand how to design an efficient parser; Skills required: PYTHON, JAVA; C++ is optional; Skills required: PYTHON, Java , C++, SQL, UNIX, database programming
职位福利: 
职位描述总结: Junior Level Software Developer position at a financial technology company on Wall Street. Requires a Computer Science degree and intensive programming background. Primary skills needed are Python, Java, and C++. Responsibilities include developing Bloomberg terminal software, structured products tools, middle office reporting, and APIs. Financial product knowledge is optional. Competitive compensation offered.


-------------------------
Rank 3:
JD Content: 职位名称: Backend Software Developer
公司名称: CyberCoders
工作地点: Washington D.C.
职位职责: Developing new features; Implementing a microservices-based architecture; Providing operational support; Maintaining and developing Drupal custom modules; Enhancing HubSpot CRM integration (API)
职位要求: Experience building and maintaining RESTful APIs; Strong Object Oriented Programming skills; At least 3 years of experience with implementing RESTful APIs using PHP, Python, or Go; Ability to write complex SQL queries for MariaDB or PostgreSQL; Hands-on experience with AWS development using EC2, EB, IAM, S3, Lambda, Cloudfront; Experience with messaging frameworks such as RabbitMQ, Redis; Experience in Test Driven Development; Ability to set up and configure Continuous Integration environment; Knowledge of Agile practices
职位福利: $100,000-$130,000 Base Salary; Vacation/PTO; Medical; Dental; Vision; Opportunity to build a market leading service; Grow professionally with the company
职位描述总结: CyberCoders is seeking a Backend Software Developer to join their rapidly growing ratings and reviews platform in Washington D.C. The role involves developing new features, implementing microservices architecture, and providing operational support. Candidates need strong backend development skills with experience in RESTful APIs, AWS, and database management. The position offers competitive compensation and benefits, with a salary range of $100,000-$130,000, plus opportunities for professional growth in a dynamic startup environment.


-------------------------

metricsData.name: Retrieve JD Evaluation [GEval]
metricsData.reason: The actual output shows strong content relevance for Rank 1, which directly aligns with the input's senior .NET expertise and leadership roles by emphasizing .NET Core, Agile environments, and mentorship. Rank 3 also demonstrates relevance through backend and API focus, matching the input's experience. However, Rank 2 is weak due to mismatched Python/Java requirements and a junior-level designation inconsistent with the input's senior background. Ranking prioritizes alignment correctly, with top roles reflecting senior .NET and backend skills.
metricsData.verboseLogs:
Criteria:
请根据input提供的简历内容，判断actual_output中检索到的职位描述内容是否与input中的简历内容相关。
并且注意：
actual_output是结构化输出，它的内容和解释如下：
    Rank i: int = Field(..., description="检索结果中排名，i值越小表示排名越靠前，在检索结果中表示相关性越高")
    JD Content: str = Field(..., description="检索结果中对应Rank的职位描述内容字符串。")
    
你需要判断actual_output中检索到的职位描述内容是否与input中的简历内容相关，并且相关性的排名是否合理（排名靠前的是否比排名靠后的相关性更高）。
 
 
Evaluation Steps:
[
    "内容相关性：actual_output中的职位描述内容是否与input中的简历内容相关联？input中的简历是否与actual_output中职位描述中提到的关键技能、经验或者其他要求有关？",
    "排名合理性：actual_output中检索到的职位描述内容的相关性排名是否合理？排名靠前的职位描述内容是否比排名靠后的职位描述内容更适配input中的简历内容？",
    "只要actual_output的内容与input的内容的相关性高，并且排名依据相关性来看是合理的，就可以给予高评分。"
] 
 
Rubric:
None 
 
Score: 0.8
